name: keyword-research
title: Keyword Research - Google Autocomplete Long-Tail Keyword Finder
description: Free Ahrefs Keywords Explorer & SEMrush alternative. Expand seed keywords via Google Autocomplete, auto-generate question variants (who/what/when/where/why/how), score by long-tail potential (0-100). Supports 50+ languages (Japanese, English, Spanish, German, etc.). Bulk seed processing, JSON/CSV export. No API keys. Perfect for SEO keyword strategy, content calendar planning, FAQ generation, and blog topic research. From $0.01/run.
